title: Llama7B attention HBM command-calibrated service closure
hypothesis: The source-backed HBM aggregate calibration preserved the selected Llama7B family but changed the dominant energy component to HBM. Scaling the existing command-class HBM/DRAM service model to that source-backed energy anchor and sweeping row-hit locality should show whether command-mix-aware service accounting preserves the frontier before investing in a full stack-current/controller model.

direct_comparison.primary_question: Does source-scaled command-class HBM service accounting preserve the Llama7B energy-best family under row-hit sensitivity?
include: consume the merged HBM/DRAM service-energy result
consume the merged source-backed HBM energy calibration result
globally scale read-hit, read-miss, write, activate/precharge, and command pJ terms to the HBM2 aggregate pJ/bit anchor
sweep row-hit rates and recompute service latency and energy
report latency-best, energy-best, dominant energy component, and selected family
follow_on_broad_sweep: If source-scaled command service moves the family under row-hit sensitivity, prioritize stack-current/controller modeling.
If the family remains stable, move to direct compute-energy measurement for the selected dense compute point.

expected_benefit: Retains row-hit, row-miss, command, and activate/precharge sensitivity instead of collapsing HBM energy to a flat byte charge.
Connects the command-class HBM service model to source-backed aggregate HBM energy.
Clarifies whether HBM locality uncertainty can move the current energy frontier.
risks: The command-class scale is derived from an aggregate HBM pJ/bit source, not vendor current tables.
The row-hit latency sensitivity reuses the analytic HBM controller service model.
Compute energy remains scaled from the nearest measured dense compute reference.

required_evaluations.objective: Scale the HBM/DRAM command-service energy model to the source-backed HBM aggregate energy anchor and sweep row-hit sensitivity for retained Llama7B frontier rows.

expected_result.reason: Determine whether source-scaled command-class HBM service accounting preserves the selected Llama7B energy family under row-hit sensitivity.
